summary: A narrated slideshow recapping USCIS work during Trump's first 100 days: title cards, a clip of Trump signing an executive order, B-roll of the USCIS building and a fingerprint and biometric station, and a closing USCIS.gov card. It is a voiceover-driven informational recap with no music track. On-screen text reads 'President Trump's First 100 Days: Shaping Immigration Policy' and 'USCIS.gov'.
notable_text: President Trump's First 100 Days: Shaping Immigration Policy; USCIS.gov
